hero.title: Welcome to Fun N Food Resort & Water Park
hero.text: Indore's Premier Family Destination. Nestled in a lush green environment near Tejaji Nagar on Khandwa Road, we offer an unforgettable mix of thrilling water slides, luxurious accommodations, multi-cuisine dining, and sprawling marriage gardens for your grandest celebrations.

brands.title: SKCPL Group
brands.text: Fun N Food Resort is proudly managed by the SKCPL Group, delivering decades of excellence in hospitality and event management.

items.title: Thrilling Water Park
items.text: Dive into excitement at our state-of-the-art water park! Featuring massive slides, a crystal-clear swimming pool, and a high-energy Rain Dance area, it's the perfect way to beat the heat and create unforgettable family memories.

items.title: Deluxe Resort Rooms
items.text: Relax in our highly comfortable, air-conditioned rooms designed for ultimate relaxation. Each room is equipped with modern amenities, premium bedding, and a peaceful ambiance to recharge after a fun-filled day.

items.title: Sports & Indoor Games
items.text: Challenge your friends to a game of cricket or football on our massive open grounds, or stay cool indoors with snooker, billiards, carom, chess, and more in our dedicated indoor sports zone.

dining.title: Multi-Cuisine Dining
dining.text:
Savor the taste of perfection at the Fun N Food Restaurant. Our expert chefs prepare a vast array of authentic multi-cuisine delicacies, from traditional Indian thalis to popular international dishes.

Whether you are enjoying a casual family dinner or ordering late-night room service to your deluxe suite, our restaurant guarantees a delightful culinary experience with impeccable hygiene and service.

events.title: Banquets & Marriage Gardens
events.text:
Make your special day truly grand. Our resort features sprawling, lush green marriage gardens capable of hosting thousands of guests for large-scale weddings and receptions under the open sky.

For indoor functions, corporate conferences, and private parties, our fully air-conditioned banquet halls provide an elegant setting with complete catering and event management support from the SKCPL Group.

contact.address: Fun N Food Resort, Anuradha Nagar, Khandwa Road (Near BSNL Exchange), Tejaji Nagar, Indore, Madhya Pradesh 452020
